name: Rhubarb Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: Honey to taste (less than a cup)
1/4 cup water (I could have used less)
recipeInstructions:
First make a graham-cracker crust, and set it out to cool.
Heat rhubarb, honey, orange zest, and water over stove until the rhubarb gives off its water and becomes soft. Taste frequently to determine the amount of honey needed (consider making it slightly sweeter as the cream will dilute it).
Meanwhile, whip the cream. Sprinkle gelatin over the rhubarb mixture and stir until dissolved.
Remove pot from heat and place in a larger pot of ice water. Stir occasionally until the mixture begins to thicken.
Immediately remove the pot from the ice water and fold in the whipped cream.
Pour filling into prepared crust.
Refrigerate for an hour or so, and
